object_types.name: Person
object_types.definition: Any individual tracked by the HR system.

source_references.excerpt: We track people in the HR system by their person ID.

object_types.name: Employee
object_types.definition: A person who works for the company.

source_references.excerpt: An employee is a person who works for us. Each employee gets an employee ID.

object_types.name: Manager
object_types.definition: An employee who manages other employees.

source_references.excerpt: A manager is an employee who manages other employees.

object_types.name: Department
object_types.definition: An organizational unit within the company.

source_references.excerpt: Each department has a unique department code.
Every employee works in a department.
Each department is managed by exactly one manager.

subtypes.description: An Employee is a Person who works for the company. Employees have their own employee_id distinct from person_id.

source_references.excerpt: An employee is a person who works for us. Each employee gets an employee ID.

subtypes.description: A Manager is an Employee who manages other employees.

source_references.excerpt: A manager is an employee who manages other employees.

inferred_constraints.description: Each Employee works in at most one Department.

source_references.excerpt: Every employee works in a department.

inferred_constraints.description: Every Employee works in some Department.

source_references.excerpt: Every employee works in a department.

inferred_constraints.description: Each Department is managed by at most one Manager.

source_references.excerpt: Each department is managed by exactly one manager.

inferred_constraints.description: Each Department has at most one DepartmentName.
